title: Pack of 12 40mm Suction Cup Hooks - Premium PVC Cups with Metal Hooks, Window Glass Suction Cups, Ideal for Bathrooms, Towels, Sponges, Wreaths or Kitchen Utensils
features: 🛀🧼🧹🪝 12PC SUCTION HOOK SET FOR HOME, KITCHEN OR BATHROOM - Our Small suction cup hooks use durable clear PVC and stainless steel hooks. lightweight, waterproof and temperature resistant. Great for home use, kitchen and bathroom appliances. They will not yellow or lose adhesion over time

🛀🧼🧹🪝 THICKENED CLEAR PVC SUCTION CUPS - The vacuum suction cups can be held on various smooth contact surfaces, such as glass, marble walls, etc. But Ceiling hooks will not stick to cement walls, texture board, mosaic wall, uneven tile, etc

🛀🧼🧹🪝 EASY TO USE AND NON INVASIVE - The clear suction cup hooks don't need any external tools or fixings to work, making installation only a few seconds! Simply wipe down the surface you wish to apply the hook to and insure that it is dry, then effortlessly push the suction cup against the surface to suction to the wall. Includes a pull tab for easy removable

🛀🧼🧹🪝 VERSATILE, REUSABLE AND STICKS TO MULTI SURFACES - The shower suction hooks will easily and conveniently sucks to windows, mirrors, glass, metals. Each command hook can meet your different needs. It is very convenient to organise a bathroom, kitchen, bedroom, office, school, hotel or store
description: Our Small suction cup hooks use durable clear PVC and stainless steel hooks. lightweight, waterproof and temperature resistant. Great for home use, kitchen and bathroom appliances. They will not yellow or lose adhesion over time. Thickened clear PVC suction cups. The vacuum suction cups can be held on various smooth contact surfaces, such as glass, marble walls, etc. But ceiling hooks will not stick to cement walls, texture board, mosaic wall, uneven tile, etc. The clear suction cup hooks don't need any external tools or fixings to work, making installation only a few seconds! Simply wipe down the surface you wish to apply the hook to and insure that it is dry, then effortlessly push the suction cup against the surface to suction to the wall. Includes a pull tab for easy removable. The shower suction hooks will easily and conveniently sucks to windows, mirrors, glass, metals. Each command hook can meet your different needs. It is very convenient to organise a bathroom, kitchen, bedroom, office, school, hotel or store.
